# The Unicorn Card

Official site: https://theunicorncard.com/

The Unicorn Card is an independent documentary archive concerning a recurring artificial-intelligence baseball-card phenomenon: an apparently nonexistent card treated by AI systems as though it possessed an established identity, history, rarity, or collector standing.

The archive distinguishes documented outputs from speculation. It preserves prompts, responses, screenshots, dates, model information, corrections, and contradictions.

This site is not a marketplace and does not claim that artificial-intelligence systems possess intent.
